Ou 
Fixé: @code = active 
Ou 
Fixé: @code = aborted<br class="binding"/><span style="font-weight:bold" title="null" class="binding">Binding: </span><a href="ValueSet-fr-valueset-status-code.html" title="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/ValueSet/fr-valueset-status-code" class="binding">ValueSet - FR ValueSet StatusCode</a><span title="null" class="binding"> (</span><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/terminologies.html#required" title="To be conformant, the concept in this element SHALL be from the specified value set." class="binding">required</a><span title="null" class="binding">)</span></td></tr>

  <extension
             url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/logical-target">
    <valueBoolean>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/data-absent-reason">
        <valueCode value="not-applicable"/>
      </extension>
    </valueBoolean>
  </extension>
  <extension
             url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/logical-container">
    <valueUri
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ClinicalDocument"/>
  </extension>
  <extension
             url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
    <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:v3"/>
  </extension>
  <extension url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
    <valueString value="act"/>
  </extension>
  <extension
             url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/type-profile-style">
    <valueUri value="cda"/>
  </extension>
  <url
       value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-resultats-examens-de-biologie-medicale"/>
  <version value="0.1.0-snapshot"/>
  <name value="FRCDAResultatsExamensDeBiologieMedicale"/>
  <title value="CDA - FR Resultats examens de biologie medicale"/>
  <status value="draft"/>
  <date value="2026-06-09T09:28:52+00:00"/>
  <publisher
             value="Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris"/>
  <contact>
    <name
          value="Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris"/>
    <telecom>
      <system value="url"/>
      <value value="https://esante.gouv.fr"/>
    </telecom>
  </contact>
  <description
               value="Entrée FR-Resultats-examens-de-biologie-medicale: IHE-PCC - Laboratory Report Data Processing. 
 - Le modèle de l'entrée Résultats d'examens de biologie médicale est identique quelle que soit la discipline de biologie. Cette entrée de type act peut comporter une liste d'éléments fils entryRelationship de typeCode='COMP'. Les éléments ci-dessous ne sont utilisables que dans l'entrée Résultats d'examens de biologie médicale : 
  - Prélèvement (Specimen Collection – 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.2) 
  - Batterie d'examens de biologie médicale (Laboratory Battery Organizer – 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.4)
  - Isolats microbiologiques (Laboratory Isolate Organizer – 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.5) 
  - Résultat d'examen / élément clinique pertinent (Laboratory Observation – 1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.6)"/>
  <jurisdiction>
    <coding>
      <system value="urn:iso:std:iso:3166"/>
      <code value="FR"/>
      <display value="FRANCE"/>
    </coding>
  </jurisdiction>
  <fhirVersion value="4.0.1"/>
  <mapping>
    <identity value="rim"/>
    <uri value="http://hl7.org/v3"/>
    <name value="RIM Mapping"/>
  </mapping>
  <kind value="logical"/>
  <abstract value="false"/>
  <type value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
  <baseDefinition
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
  <derivation value="constraint"/>
  <snapshot>
    <extension
               url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/snapshot-base-version">
      <valueString value="2.0.1-sd"/>
    </extension>
    <element id="Act">
      <path value="Act"/>
      <short value="Base for all types and resources"/>
      <definition
                  value="Defines the basic properties of every data value. This is an abstract type, meaning that no value can be just a data value without belonging to any concrete type. Every concrete type is a specialization of this general abstract DataValue type."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Base"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="n/a"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId">
      <path value="Act.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.templateId">
      <path value="Act.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="2"/>
      <max value="2"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry">
      <path value="Act.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry"/>
      <short
             value="Conformité Laboratory Report Data Processing Entry (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité Laboratory Report Data Processing Entry (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.templateId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.templateId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry.displayable">
      <path value="Act.templateId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry.root">
      <path value="Act.templateId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition
                  value="A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.templateId:iheLaboratoryReportDataProcessingEntry.extension">
      <path value="Act.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

      </type>
    </element>

      <path value="Act.id"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code">
      <path value="Act.code"/>
      <short value="Code dont dérive le code de section"/>
      <definition value="Code dont dérive le code de section"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.code"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActCode"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.code.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.code">
      <path value="Act.code.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="Act.code.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.displayName">
      <path value="Act.code.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.code.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.code.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.originalText">
      <path value="Act.code.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.qualifier">
      <path value="Act.code.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.code.translation">
      <path value="Act.code.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.text">
      <path value="Act.text"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.statusCode">
      <path value="Act.statusCode"/>
      <short
             value="Niveau de complétude.
Fixé: @code = completed 
Ou 
Fixé: @code = active 
Ou 
Fixé: @code = aborted"/>
      <definition value="Niveau de complétude"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.statusCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/ValueSet/fr-valueset-status-code"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Act.effectiveTime"/>
      <short value="Date et heure du résultat"/>
      <definition value="Date et heure du résultat"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.priorityCode">
      <path value="Act.priorityCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.priorityCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

      </type>
      <binding>

      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.languageCode">
      <path value="Act.languageCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.languageCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      <path value="Act.subject"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.subject"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Subject"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-sujet-non-humain"/>

      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>

    <element id="Act.specimen">
      <path value="Act.specimen"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.specimen"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Specimen"/>

        <max value="*"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Performer2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-laboratoire-executant"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.author">
      <path value="Act.author"/>
      <short value="Auteur"/>
      <definition value="Auteur"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.author"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Author"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.informant">
      <path value="Act.informant"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.informant"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Informant"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant">
      <path value="Act.participant"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="typeCode"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.participant"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Participant2"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats">
      <path value="Act.participant"/>
      <sliceName value="frParticipantValideurResultats"/>
      <short value="Valideur de ces résultats"/>
      <definition value="Valideur de ces résultats"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.participant"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Participant2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-participant-corps"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <short
             value="templateId est optionnel. S'il est présent, son root peut être 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109 et/ou une autre OID valide"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="templateId"/>
      <short value="TemplateId avec root égal à 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
      <definition
                  value="TemplateId avec root égal à 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId.root">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition
                  value="A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId.extension">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.templateId:templateId-other">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="templateId-other"/>
      <short value="Autre TemplateId"/>
      <definition value="Autre TemplateId"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.typeCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="AUTHEN"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAParticipationType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.contextControlCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.contextControlCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.contextControlCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <fixedCode value="OP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAContextControl"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.sdtcFunctionCode">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="functionCode"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.participant.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time">
      <path value="Act.participant.time"/>
      <short value="Date et heure de la participation"/>
      <definition value="Date et heure de la participation"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.time"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.value">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-date-format">
        <valueString value="YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.UUUU[+|-ZZzz]"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-date-rules">
        <valueString value="year-valid"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.participant.time.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A quantity specifying a point on the axis of natural time. A point in time is most often represented as a calendar expression."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="TS.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="dateTime"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ts-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.operator">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.operator"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A code specifying whether the set component is included (union) or excluded (set-difference) from the set, or other set operations with the current set component and the set as constructed from the representation stream up to the current point."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SXCM_TS.operator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="I"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDASetOperator"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.low">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.low"/>
      <label value="Low Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the low limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.low"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.center">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.center"/>
      <label value="Central Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The arithmetic mean of the interval (low plus high divided by 2). The purpose of distinguishing the center as a semantic property is for conversions of intervals from and to point values."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.center"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.width">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.width"/>
      <label value="Width"/>
      <definition
                  value="The difference between high and low boundary. The purpose of distinguishing a width property is to handle all cases of incomplete information symmetrically. In any interval representation only two of the three properties high, low, and width need to be stated and the third can be derived."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.width"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.time.high">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.high"/>
      <label value="High Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the high limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.high"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.awarenessCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.awarenessCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.awarenessCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantValideurResultats.participantRole">
      <path value="Act.participant.participantRole"/>
      <short value="Rôle du participant dans l'acte"/>
      <definition value="Rôle du participant dans l'acte"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.participantRole"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ParticipantRole"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-participant-role"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen">
      <path value="Act.participant"/>
      <sliceName value="frParticipantResponsableExamen"/>
      <short value="Responsable de cet examen"/>
      <definition value="Responsable de cet examen"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Act.participant"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Participant2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-participant-corps"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.realmCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId.root">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <short
             value="templateId est optionnel. S'il est présent, son root peut être 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109 et/ou une autre OID valide"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId:templateId">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="templateId"/>
      <short value="TemplateId avec root égal à 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
      <definition
                  value="TemplateId avec root égal à 1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>

             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId:templateId.nullFlavor">

        <max value="1"/>

      <definition

The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId:templateId.displayable">

      <label value="Displayable"/>

      <min value="0"/>

      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId:templateId.root">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition
                  value="A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.109"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.templateId:templateId.extension">
      <path value="Act.participant.templateId.extension"/>

      <max value="1"/>

      <definition value="Autre TemplateId"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>

      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.typeCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="RESP"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAParticipationType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.contextControlCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.contextControlCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.contextControlCode"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile

      </type>
      <fixedCode value="OP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAContextControl"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.sdtcFunctionCode">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="functionCode"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.participant.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.sdtcFunctionCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time">
      <path value="Act.participant.time"/>
      <short value="Date et heure de la participation"/>
      <definition value="Date et heure de la participation"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Participant2.time"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.value">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-date-format">
        <valueString value="YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.UUUU[+|-ZZzz]"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-date-rules">
        <valueString value="year-valid"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Act.participant.time.value"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A quantity specifying a point on the axis of natural time. A point in time is most often represented as a calendar expression."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="TS.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="dateTime"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ts-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.operator">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.operator"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="A code specifying whether the set component is included (union) or excluded (set-difference) from the set, or other set operations with the current set component and the set as constructed from the representation stream up to the current point."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SXCM_TS.operator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueCode value="I"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDASetOperator"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.low">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.low"/>
      <label value="Low Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the low limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.low"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.center">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.center"/>
      <label value="Central Value"/>
      <definition
                  value="The arithmetic mean of the interval (low plus high divided by 2). The purpose of distinguishing the center as a semantic property is for conversions of intervals from and to point values."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.center"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.width">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.width"/>
      <label value="Width"/>
      <definition
                  value="The difference between high and low boundary. The purpose of distinguishing a width property is to handle all cases of incomplete information symmetrically. In any interval representation only two of the three properties high, low, and width need to be stated and the third can be derived."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.width"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.time.high">
      <path value="Act.participant.time.high"/>
      <label value="High Boundary"/>
      <definition value="This is the high limit of the interval."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="IVL_TS.high"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVXB-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Act.participant:frParticipantResponsableExamen.awarenessCode">
      <path value="Act.participant.awarenessCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      </type>
    </element>

      <definition value="Rôle du participant dans l'acte"/>
